name: Platform Handle Finder
description: Entry-point resolver for platform analysis and deep reports. Given a business name and/or website, discover the most likely Instagram, YouTube, and Play Store handles/pages via Google search, with confidence scores per platform. Use this FIRST whenever an agent needs platform-specific sentiment or a multi-channel deep analysis, so downstream sentiment skills receive clean, high-confidence handles.

platforms.description: Desired platforms as a comma-separated list of ids: instagram,youtube,playstore (optional). If omitted, the skill will infer platforms from the user message.
